headline: NiSource to Release First Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Host Conference Call on May 6
summary: MERRILLVILLE, Ind., April 22, 2026--On May 6, 2026, NiSource Inc. will announce first quarter 2026 financial results and host a conference call for investors.
